pkgmetadata.longdescription: Fork of media-video/pipewire from the gentoo tree. Removes the systemd hard-dependency from the system-service USE flag, allowing it to install an OpenRC system init script instead. When system-service is enabled on OpenRC, gentoo-pipewire-launcher and the XDG autostart entry are not installed (see bug #964059), and /etc/profile.d/pipewire-system.sh sets PIPEWIRE_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/pipewire so user sessions connect to the system socket.

use.flag: Install OpenRC system init script (on OpenRC) or systemd unit files (on systemd) for running as a system-wide service using acct-user/pipewire. On OpenRC, skips gentoo-pipewire-launcher to avoid duplicate instances (bug #964059).
